sections.label: 🐛 Fix
items:
Skip

elements nested inside a

in collectSetlistElements. querySelectorAll('p, blockquote') returns both the
and its inner

; when the

contains a ' / ' separator it passed the prose filter and was counted twice, doubling every recording-session song in yearFlat and producing spurious year-only mismatches.

sections.label: 🐛 Fix
items:
Stop collecting setlist elements when an inline event date header (

starting with YYYY-MM-DD - ) is encountered. Previously, events without their own named anchor (e.g. recording sessions listed inline on the year page) caused collectSetlistElements to sweep up setlists from dozens of subsequent unrelated events.

Fall back to plain <li> text when parsing detail-page setlists for songs that have no dedicated /song: page link. Previously such songs (e.g. REFRIGERATOR BLUES) were silently dropped, causing an empty detailSections result, an early return, and a missing toggle button. Venue/date entries (YYYY-MM-DD prefix) are excluded from the fallback.

sections.label: 🚀 Feature
items: Add toggle button on DETAIL pages (after #page-title) to switch the active setlist tab between the original unprocessed content and the userscript-processed diff view. Uses show/hide on wrapper divs inside the setlist td rather than replacing #page-content, so wikidot tab-switching and all tooltip event listeners remain functional.

sections.label: 🚀 Feature
items: Add setlist/recording session comparison between YEAR and DETAIL pages using LCS diff with Levenshtein char-diff reclassification for near-misses.

Parse YEAR page inline setlists (

/

) per-event using anchor boundaries.

Parse DETAIL page setlists from #wiki-tab-0-1
    /
      with section labels from

      headers.
Colour-code setlist diffs: green (match), light-blue (year-only), yellow (detail-only), red (char-diff).
Rich hover tooltips on non-matching songs via showSongTooltip.
DETAIL page mode: style existing <li>s and insert missing year-only songs inline.
Extend @include to match DETAIL pages (gig/nogig/recording/interview/offstage/onstage/rehearsal/soundcheck).
Add page-level global toggle button (after #page-title) to switch entire #page-content between original and processed view.
Add per-section toggle buttons (after each <hr>) to flip individual year-page sections between original and processed state.

sections.label: 🐛 Fix
items:
Ignore prose description

s when collecting setlist elements — only

elements containing the ' / ' song-list delimiter qualify;

containers are always included.
Fix global toggle blank screen: use explicit 'block'/'none' values instead of clearing inline style, which left the CSS hide rule in effect.

Fix per-section toggle no visual effect: serialise original HTML as a plain string in wrapYearSections and only create the originalDiv node inside insertSectionToggle (after processing), preventing extractYearPageEvents from finding cloned <a> links and producing duplicate diffs.

sections.label: 🔧 Refactor
items: Rename script from brucebase-eventcheck.user.js to BruceBaseParser.user.js and reorganise repository layout.
Add new CSS classes: .bb-song-{match,year-only,detail-only,char-diff}, .bb-char-{match,diff}, .bb-sep, .bb-section-label, .bb-toggle-btn.

sections.label: 📝 Docs
items: Rewrite CLAUDE.md with full v1.3/v1.4 architecture documentation covering all three page modes, processing pipeline, LCS diff algorithm, colour-coding scheme, anchor format, name normalisation rules, and shared utility functions.

sections.label: 🚀 Feature
items: Add support for YYYY-list pages: fetch the corresponding YEAR page once, build an anchor→name map, and compare each list event name (after stripping optional subtitle suffix) against the YEAR page entry.
Collect sibling text nodes after the <a> tag so suffixes like '(Golden Globe Awards)' are included in raw name capture.

sections.label: 🐛 Fix
items: Tooltip box now auto-sizes to content with no line-wrapping.

sections.label: 🚀 Feature
items: Initial release of BruceBase event name checker userscript.
Validates event name consistency between YEAR overview pages and their DETAIL pages.
Flags matches (✅), mismatches (❌), unknown event types (❓), and fetch failures (⚠️) with inline glyphs and rich diff tooltips.
Supports all known event types: gig, interview, nogig, offstage, onstage, recording, rehearsal, soundcheck.
Name normalisation: moves '(The)' suffix before comma to front, inserts ' - ' after date, uppercases for comparison.
Token-level diff displayed in hover tooltips via buildDiffHtml.
